storyBeat: 后羿射日 + 娶嫦娥 — 神會盯著他們嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚故事的開場單字，左邊中文、右邊英文：
🔑 sun = 太陽
🔑 sky = 天空
🔑 bow = 弓
🔑 hero = 英雄
把這 4 個字記進心裡，故事聽起來就輕鬆多了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in old China, ten suns came up in the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 很久很久以前，在古老的中國，天上有十個太陽。奶奶說，光是想像那樣的天空，就覺得熱得喘不過氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The land was hot. The rivers dried up. The plants died.
questions.explanationZh: 土地被烤得滾燙，河水一點一點乾掉，植物枯黃掉落——十個太陽同時高掛，大地根本受不了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No rain fell. No green grass grew.
questions.questionEn: Was life easy for the people?
questions.explanationZh: 沒有雨、沒有綠草——你想想，這樣的日子，人要怎麼活下去？當然不輕鬆，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 沒有雨。沒有綠草。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A strong young man named Hou Yi lifted his bow.
questions.explanationZh: 就在這時候，一個叫后羿的強壯年輕人站出來了。他把弓舉起來，對著天空，奶奶說，那個姿勢，真的很帥。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He shot the suns one by one. Only one sun was left.
questions.question: What did Hou Yi do to the suns?
questions.explanationZh: 他一支一支把太陽射落，只留下最後一個。那些被射中的太陽，一個接著一個從天上消失——所以是「讓它們消失」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿對后把太陽一個個射下。只剩最後一個。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The land was saved. The people loved Hou Yi.
questions.explanationZh: 大地得救了！河水開始流，植物慢慢回來，人民圍著后羿，感激得不知道說什麼才好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen Mother said he could marry a sweet young woman.
questions.question: What did the Queen Mother say?
questions.explanationZh: 西王母說后羿可以娶一個溫柔的女子——用現在的話說，就是「娶善良的妻子」。
questions.sentenceZh: 西王母說他可以娶一個溫柔的好女子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He married Chang'e. They lived in a small house.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿娶了嫦娥，兩人住在一間小屋子裡。奶奶說，那段日子，應該是他們最平靜、最幸福的時光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the people feel about Hou Yi?
questions.question: How did the people feel?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿救了大地，人民對他感激又崇拜——當然是好愛他啦！
questions.sentenceZh: 人民對后羿的感情是怎樣的？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each action to its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
這 4 個詞是今天故事的核心動作：
🔑 lift his bow = 舉起弓
🔑 dry up = 乾枯
🔑 shoot the suns = 射下太陽
🔑 save the land = 拯救大地

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Long ago in old China, ten suns came up in the sky. The land was hot. The rivers dried up. The plants died.
questions.question: What is the main idea of this part?
options: a heavy rain flooded the whole land
farmers worked hard in a warm summer
rivers carried fresh water to the villages
ten suns caused great suffering on earth
optionsZh: 一場大雨把大地淹沒了
農夫在溫暖夏天辛勤耕作
questions.explanationZh: 十個太陽讓大地熱壞了，河流乾了、植物死了——這整段說的是「十個太陽讓大地受苦」。
questions.sentenceZh: 很久很久以前，中國天空升起了十個太陽。大地滾燙，河流枯乾，植物也死了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He shot the suns one by one. Only one sun was left.
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi shoot all ten suns down?
questions.explanationZh: 他一個個射，但最後留下一個——不是全部射光，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他一個個把太陽射落，最後只剩一個。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The land was saved. The people loved Hou Yi.
questions.question: Why did the people love Hou Yi?
options: shot the extra suns and saved everyone
brought rain and saved the harvest
built houses for all the poor families
drove away dangerous animals for them
optionsZh: 射落多餘的太陽、救了所有人
為他們趕走了危險動物
questions.explanationZh: 后羿射下多餘的太陽，大地才得救——他是英雄，人民當然愛他。所以是「射落多餘的太陽，救了所有人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 大地得救了，人民都好愛后羿。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The Queen Mother said he could marry a sweet young woman.
questions.questionEn: Was the Queen Mother angry at Hou Yi?
questions.explanationZh: 西王母讓后羿娶個好女子——這是獎勵，不是懲罰，她不是在生氣，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 西王母說他可以娶一個溫柔的好女子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He married Chang'e. They lived in a small house.
questions.question: What do we learn about Hou Yi and Chang'e's life together?
options: busy and grand, full of visitors every day
quiet and simple, away from the palace
lonely and cold, with no one around them
dangerous and exciting, on a long journey
optionsZh: 熱鬧隆重，每天都有訪客
孤單又冷清，身邊沒有人
充滿危險和刺激，踏上長途旅程
questions.explanationZh: 他們住在一間小屋子裡——是平靜、簡單的生活，不是什麼宮殿大宅。所以是「平靜簡單，遠離皇宮」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他娶了嫦娥，兩個人住在一間小屋子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the English words to their Chinese meanings.
questions.explanationZh:
再複習一次：
🔑 hero = 英雄
🔑 marry = 結婚
🔑 loved = 喜愛
🔑 saved = 救了

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The people loved them both. Would the gods watch them, too?
questions.explanationZh: 人民愛著他們倆。可是奶奶說，被人愛戴，有時候也會惹來神的注意……

storyBeat: 西王母給仙藥 — 仙藥是什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚再認識 4 個字！
🔑 hill = 山
🔑 pill = 藥丸
🔑 white = 白色
🔑 hide = 藏
其中「藥丸」是今晚最重要的東西——等你聽到就懂了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One spring day, the Queen Mother came down from her hill.
questions.explanationZh: 那個春天，西王母從高山上走下來。奶奶說，這樣的事情，不是每個人都能遇上的。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She walked to Hou Yi's home. Her face was kind.
questions.question: Why did the Queen Mother come?
questions.explanationZh: 她走到后羿家門口，臉上帶著慈和的笑——這樣的來訪，是要「拜訪他」，不是找麻煩。
questions.sentenceZh: 西王母走到后羿家，臉上帶著溫和的神情。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave Hou Yi a small white pill in her hand.
questions.explanationZh: 西王母把一顆白色的小藥丸，輕輕放在手心，遞給后羿。奶奶說，那顆藥丸，不是普通的東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The pill shone with a soft warm light.
questions.questionEn: Was the pill an ordinary pill?
questions.explanationZh: 那顆藥丸會發出柔柔的暖光——普通的藥哪裡會發光？這當然不是普通藥，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 那顆藥丸散著柔和的溫暖光芒。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "This pill can let one live for ever," she said.
questions.explanationZh: 「這顆藥丸，可以讓一個人永遠活著，」西王母說。奶奶說這句話的時候，停了一下。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What can the white pill do?
questions.question: What can the pill do?
questions.explanationZh: 「永遠活著」——這就是「長生不老」，所以答案是「給人長生」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那顆白色藥丸能做什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "But only one of you can take it," she said.
questions.explanationZh: 「但你們只有一個人可以吃，」她說。后羿和嫦娥，兩個人，一顆藥……這問題，你想想，難不難？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There was just one pill. There were two of them.
questions.question: What was the problem with the pill?
questions.explanationZh: 一顆藥，兩個人，不能分著吃——這就是問題所在，所以是「兩人不能分」。
questions.sentenceZh: 只有一顆藥丸，卻有兩個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi put the pill in a small box. He hid the box.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿把藥丸放進小盒子，再把盒子藏起來。奶奶說，他大概還不知道怎麼決定。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each word to its Chinese meaning.
questions.explanationZh:
今天的重點詞：
🔑 spring = 春天
🔑 pill = 藥丸
🔑 live for ever = 永遠活著
🔑 hide = 藏起來

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She gave Hou Yi a small white pill in her hand. The pill shone with a soft warm light.
questions.question: What tells us the pill was special?
options: its sweet smell filled the whole room
its gentle glow showed it had power
it was heavier than any stone
it made a loud sound when touched
optionsZh: 它的香氣充滿整個房間
它柔和的光芒顯示它有神力
碰到它會發出很大的聲音
questions.explanationZh: 那顆藥丸會發出柔柔的暖光——光芒代表它有神力。「它柔和的光芒顯示它有力量」就是這個意思。
questions.sentenceZh: 她把一顆白色小藥丸輕輕放在手心遞給后羿，那顆藥丸散發著柔和的暖光。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "But only one of you can take it," she said.
questions.questionEn: Could Hou Yi and Chang'e both take the pill?
questions.explanationZh: 西王母說只有一個人可以吃——不能兩個都吃，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 「但你們只有一個人可以吃，」她說。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi put the pill in a small box. He hid the box.
questions.question: What did Hou Yi do with the pill?
options: 🎁 gave it away as a gift
questions.explanationZh: 后羿把藥丸放進盒子、把盒子藏起來——也就是「把它鎖起來藏好」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿把藥丸放進小盒子，把盒子藏了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She _____ Hou Yi a small white pill.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去發生的事，主詞是「她（she）」，動詞要用過去式——「give」的過去式是「gave」，所以選 gave。
questions.sentenceZh: 她___后羿一顆白色小藥丸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There was just one pill. There were two of them.
questions.question: What does this situation tell us?
options: one of them would have to give up living forever
they could take turns eating the pill every year
the pill would grow bigger if they waited longer
the Queen Mother would bring two pills next time
optionsZh: 其中一個人要放棄長生不老
他們可以輪流每年吃一次
只要等久一點，藥丸會變大
西王母下次會帶兩顆藥來
questions.explanationZh: 一顆藥、兩個人——這代表只有一個人能長生不老，另一個人必須放棄。這才是真正的難題。
questions.sentenceZh: 只有一顆藥丸，卻有兩個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi put the pill in a small box. He hid the box.
questions.questionEn: Had Hou Yi already decided who would take the pill?
questions.explanationZh: 他把藥丸收起來、藏起來——如果已經決定了，他應該直接吃，所以他還沒決定，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿把藥丸放進小盒子，把盒子藏了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The little white pill sat alone in its box. What was it really?
questions.explanationZh: 小小的白藥丸，靜靜躺在盒子裡。它是長生的機會，也是一道難題。

storyBeat: 壞學生覬覦仙藥 — 誰會吃?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
再來 4 個字，記住它們！
🔑 student = 學生
🔑 heart = 心
🔑 bad = 壞
🔑 hunt = 打獵
其中「心壞」是今晚這個人最可怕的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi had a student. The student was strong.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿有一個學生，長得高壯，看起來很厲害。可是奶奶說，光看外表，不代表心也好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his heart was bad. He thought only of himself.
questions.question: What kind of person was the student?
questions.explanationZh: 他的心很壞，心裡只裝著自己——這樣的人，用奶奶的話說，就是「又壞又自私」。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他的心很壞，只想著自己一個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day, the student saw Hou Yi open the box.
questions.explanationZh: 有一天，學生偷偷看見后羿打開那個小盒子——那顆白光閃閃的藥丸，就這樣被他看到了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The student's eyes locked on the white pill.
questions.questionEn: Did the student want the pill?
questions.explanationZh: 眼睛緊緊盯著白藥丸，一刻都沒移開——這樣的眼神，只有一個意思：他「很想要」，所以答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 學生的眼睛緊緊盯著那顆白藥丸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He wanted to live for ever, too. He waited.
questions.explanationZh: 他也想永遠活著——壞人心裡，往往都藏著這個念頭。他開始等待機會。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, he watched the door of the house.
questions.question: Why did the student watch the door?
questions.explanationZh: 天天看著那扇門，不是要打掃、不是要修理——他在等一個機會。所以是「等對的時機」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他日復一日地盯著那扇門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One morning, Hou Yi went out to hunt.
questions.explanationZh: 那天早上，后羿帶著弓箭出去打獵了。屋子裡，只剩嫦娥……和那個盒子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Where did Hou Yi go that morning?
questions.question: Where did Hou Yi go?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿那天早上出去打獵了——就是「出去打獵」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿那天早上去哪裡了？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e was home alone. The box was inside.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥獨自在家，盒子就放在屋子裡，靜靜地。奶奶說，她不知道有危險要來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words to their Chinese meanings.
questions.explanationZh:
今天的詞組：
🔑 bad heart = 壞心腸
🔑 think of himself = 只想自己
🔑 wait for a chance = 等機會
🔑 open the box = 打開盒子

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But his heart was bad. He thought only of himself.
questions.question: What kind of person is the student?
options: selfish and dangerous, not to be trusted
strong but clumsy, always making mistakes
quiet and lonely, with no friends at all
brave and honest, just a little too proud
optionsZh: 自私又危險，不值得信任
強壯但笨手笨腳，常出錯
安靜又孤單，完全沒有朋友
勇敢誠實，只是有點太驕傲
questions.explanationZh: 心壞、只想自己——這種人「自私又危險，不值得信任」，要小心他。
questions.sentenceZh: 但他的心很壞，只想著自己一個人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day, the student saw Hou Yi open the box.
questions.questionEn: Did the student find out about the pill by accident?
questions.explanationZh: 他剛好看見后羿打開盒子——這是意外看到的，不是故意打探的，所以是「偶然發現」，答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 有一天，學生看見后羿打開了那個小盒子。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The student's eyes locked on the white pill. He wanted to live for ever, too. He waited.
questions.question: What does 'he waited' tell us about his plan?
options: afraid and unsure — waiting to ask his teacher for permission
patient and cunning — waiting for the right moment to strike
kind and polite — waiting to tell Hou Yi what he had seen
bored and idle — waiting because he had nothing else to do
optionsZh: 他害怕又猶豫，等著向師父請求
他很有耐心又狡猾，等著找機會下手
他善良有禮貌，等著告訴后羿他看到了什麼
他無聊又懶，只是沒事做而等著
questions.explanationZh: 他想要仙藥，所以在等機會——這種「等」是有計謀的，「很有耐心又狡猾，等著找機會下手」。
questions.sentenceZh: 學生的眼睛緊緊盯著白藥丸，他也想永遠活著，他開始等待。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Day after day, he watched the door of the house.
questions.question: What shows the student was planning something bad?
questions.explanationZh: 天天盯著那扇門——這不是好事，這是在等機會「下手」，所以是「每天盯著那扇門等待」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他天天盯著那扇門。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One morning, Hou Yi went out to hunt. Chang'e was home alone. The box was inside.
questions.question: Why is this moment dangerous?
options: a wild animal had been seen near the house that day
Hou Yi forgot to take his bow when he went hunting
the box was left open on the table by mistake
Chang'e was alone with the pill and no one to protect her
optionsZh: 那天有野獸被看見在房子附近
后羿出門打獵忘了帶弓箭
盒子不小心被留在桌上沒蓋好
嫦娥一個人在家，身邊有仙藥，沒人保護她
questions.explanationZh: 后羿出去了，嫦娥獨自在家，藥就在屋子裡——這是壞學生等的機會，當然危險！「嫦娥一個人，沒人保護她」。
questions.sentenceZh: 那天早上，后羿出去打獵了，嫦娥一個人待在家，盒子就在屋子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e was home alone. The box was inside.
questions.questionEn: Was Chang'e in danger?
questions.explanationZh: 她一個人在家、有藥在旁邊、壞學生又在等機會——她當然有危險，答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥一個人在家，盒子就放在屋子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One day Hou Yi went out to hunt. Chang'e was home alone with the pill...
questions.explanationZh: 后羿去打獵了，嫦娥一個人在家，身邊就是那顆仙藥。奶奶說，就在這個時候……

storyBeat: 壞學生拿刀威脅 — 她會吞下去嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的字很重要，要記好：
🔑 knife = 刀
🔑 sharp = 尖
🔑 room = 房間
🔑 still = 不動
這幾個字，等一下你會用到。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The bad student walked into the house.
questions.explanationZh: 壞學生趁后羿不在，直接走進屋子裡。奶奶說，他連敲門都沒有。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulled out a long sharp knife from his coat.
questions.question: What did the student bring with him?
questions.explanationZh: 他從外套裡拔出一把細長的刀——那是「一把長薄刀」，不是別的東西。
questions.sentenceZh: 他從外套裡抽出一把細長的尖刀。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Give me the pill!" he said in a hard voice.
questions.explanationZh: 「把藥丸給我！」他的聲音又硬又冷。奶奶說，嫦娥聽到這句話，一定全身都僵住了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His face was red. His hand did not shake.
questions.questionEn: Was the student playing a joke?
questions.explanationZh: 臉紅著、手卻穩穩的——這根本不是鬧著玩的樣子，他是認真威脅，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的臉漲得通紅，但手一點都不抖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e stood very still. She thought fast.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥站著不動，但她的腦子飛速地轉——她知道，她必須做一個決定。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: If she gave him the pill, he would hurt many people.
questions.question: Why could Chang'e not just give him the pill?
questions.explanationZh: 如果把藥給他，他長生不老，會傷害更多的人——所以她不能把藥交出去，因為「別人會不安全」。
questions.sentenceZh: 如果把藥給他，他會傷害很多人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She opened the box. She picked up the small white pill.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥打開盒子，把那顆白色的小藥丸拿起來。她的手，有沒有抖？奶奶說，她不敢想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did Chang'e hold in her hand?
questions.question: What did she hold?
questions.explanationZh: 她手上拿的，就是那顆白色的仙藥——「白藥丸」。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥手裡握著什麼？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She held the pill close to her mouth.
questions.explanationZh: 她把藥丸移到嘴邊，輕輕靠著嘴唇……奶奶說，這個動作，比什麼都需要勇氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the phrases to their Chinese meanings.
questions.explanationZh:
今天的重要詞組：
🔑 pull out a knife = 拔出刀
🔑 stood very still = 站著不動
🔑 thought fast = 快速思考
🔑 hurt many people = 傷害很多人

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He pulled out a long sharp knife from his coat. "Give me the pill!" he said in a hard voice.
questions.question: What does using a knife tell us about the student?
options: trying to cut the food he brought for dinner
just showing off the new knife he bought
afraid of something dangerous outside the house
ready to use violence to get what he wanted
optionsZh: 只是在炫耀他新買的刀
他怕外面有危險的東西
為了得到想要的東西，他準備用暴力
questions.explanationZh: 拔出刀、大聲要藥——這很清楚：他準備用暴力逼嫦娥交出仙藥，「為了得到想要的，他準備用暴力」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他從外套裡抽出一把細長尖刀，用冷硬的聲音說：「把藥丸給我！」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His face was red. His hand did not shake.
questions.questionEn: Was the student nervous and unsure?
questions.explanationZh: 手一點都不抖——不抖代表他很鎮定，不是猶豫不決，所以他不緊張，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他的臉漲得通紅，但手一點都不抖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e stood very still. She thought fast.
questions.question: What does Chang'e's reaction show?
options: calm and clever even in danger
too scared to think or move at all
angry and ready to fight back hard
confused and not sure what was happening
optionsZh: 面對危險仍然冷靜聰明
嚇到完全不能思考或動作
搞不清楚狀況，覺得很困惑
questions.explanationZh: 她站著不動，但腦子快速在想——這說明她「面對危險仍然冷靜聰明」。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥站著一動不動，腦子卻快速轉著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e _____ very still while the student demanded the pill.
questions.question: Which word fits the blank?
questions.explanationZh: 故事是過去發生的，主詞是「Chang'e（她）」，所以動詞用過去式——「stand」的過去式是「stood」，選 stood。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥_____一動不動，學生還在威脅她交出藥丸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: If she gave him the pill, he would hurt many people.
questions.question: Why is giving the pill to the student so dangerous?
options: the Queen Mother would punish Hou Yi if she found out
the pill would make him stronger than ten horses
a bad man would never stop hurting people
the pill was the only medicine left in the whole village
optionsZh: 西王母知道了會懲罰后羿
藥丸會讓他強壯到勝過十匹馬
壞人會永遠不停傷害別人
questions.explanationZh: 壞人如果長生不老，就可以永遠作惡——「長生不老的壞人可以永遠傷害大家」，這才是最可怕的事。
questions.sentenceZh: 如果她把藥給他，他會傷害很多人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She opened the box. She picked up the small white pill.
questions.question: How did Chang'e feel at this moment?
questions.explanationZh: 她在威脅下打開盒子、拿起藥丸——她一定是「很害怕，但下定決心了」，要保護大家。
questions.sentenceZh: 她打開盒子，把那顆小白藥丸拿了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e looked at the pill. She picked it up. She held it close to her mouth...
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥看著藥丸，拿了起來，慢慢靠近嘴邊……奶奶說，她心裡已經決定了。

storyBeat: 嫦娥吞藥 — 接下來會發生什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚的單字，記住！
🔑 swallow = 吞
🔑 feet = 腳
🔑 light = 輕
🔑 float = 浮
這幾個字，說的全都是嫦娥接下來會發生的事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e put the pill in her mouth.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥深吸一口氣，把藥丸放進嘴裡。奶奶說這句話時，幾乎屏住呼吸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She closed her eyes. She let it go down her throat.
questions.question: What did Chang'e do with the pill?
questions.explanationZh: 她閉上眼睛，讓藥丸滑進喉嚨——她「把它吞進身體」，沒有吐出來、也沒有給別人。
questions.sentenceZh: 她閉上眼睛，讓藥丸順著喉嚨滑下去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her feet left the floor. Her hair flew up.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥的腳慢慢離開地板，頭髮飄了起來——奶奶說，那個畫面，又美又讓人心疼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her long dress lifted in the air around her.
questions.questionEn: Did Chang'e stay on the ground?
questions.explanationZh: 腳離了地，長裙也跟著飄起來——她沒有留在地上，答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她的長裙在空中輕輕飄起，把她托了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The bad student stopped. His mouth fell open.
questions.explanationZh: 壞學生站在那裡，嘴巴大大張開——他完全沒想到會看到這個，嚇呆了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could not move. He could not say a word.
questions.question: How did the student look?
questions.explanationZh: 他動不了、說不出話——這就是被嚇到僵住的樣子，「驚呆了動不了」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他動不了，一個字也說不出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e began to float to the door.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥的身體開始慢慢向門口飄過去，輕輕的，像夢一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did Chang'e's body feel now?
questions.question: How did her body feel?
questions.explanationZh: 腳都離地了，整個人飄起來——她的身體，當然是「像空氣那麼輕」。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥的身體現在感覺怎樣？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then to the window. Then to the open sky.
questions.explanationZh: 她飄向門口，再飄向窗邊，然後——是敞開的天空。奶奶說，那道光，把她帶走了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words to their Chinese meanings.
questions.explanationZh:
重點詞：
🔑 swallow = 吞
🔑 float = 飄起來
🔑 frozen with shock = 驚呆了
🔑 mouth fell open = 嘴巴大張

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e put the pill in her mouth. She closed her eyes. She let it go down her throat.
questions.question: What does swallowing the pill mean for Chang'e?
options: putting herself to sleep until Hou Yi came home
getting stronger so she could fight the student
making herself invisible to hide from danger
leaving her husband and home behind forever
optionsZh: 讓自己睡著，等到后羿回來
讓自己變強，可以對抗學生
questions.explanationZh: 吃了仙藥就會升天——她這個選擇，代表她要「永遠離開丈夫和家」，這才是真正的代價。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥把藥丸放進嘴裡，閉上眼睛，讓藥丸順著喉嚨滑下去。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Her feet left the floor. Her hair flew up.
questions.questionEn: Did the pill begin to work right away?
questions.explanationZh: 腳剛離地、頭髮就飄起來——這是藥在作用的跡象，馬上就發生了，所以是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 她的腳慢慢離開地板，頭髮也飄了起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The bad student stopped. His mouth fell open. He could not move. He could not say a word.
questions.question: Why did the student freeze?
options: what he saw was impossible and terrifying
Chang'e had used a spell to stop him moving
a loud noise outside had startled him badly
he felt sick after eating something that morning
optionsZh: 他看到的事根本不可能，嚇壞他了
嫦娥用咒語讓他動不了
外面突然的聲音把他嚇到了
他早上吃了什麼，身體不舒服
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥飛起來了——這種事根本不可能，他被嚇呆了，「他看到的事根本不可能，嚇壞他了」。
questions.sentenceZh: 壞學生停了下來，嘴巴張大，動不了，一個字也說不出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e began to float to the door.
questions.questionEn: Was Chang'e still inside the house?
questions.explanationZh: 她飄向門口——還沒出門，還在屋子裡飄著，所以是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥的身體開始慢慢飄向門口。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e began to float to the window, then out to the open sky.
questions.question: What feeling does the question 'What now?' give us?
options: relieved — the danger is finally over now
uncertain — no one knows what comes next
bored — nothing more interesting will happen
angry — someone should have stopped her
optionsZh: 如釋重負——危險終於過去了
不確定——沒人知道接下來會怎樣
無聊——不會再有有趣的事了
questions.explanationZh: 「What now?（接下來怎麼辦？）」這個問句，帶著懸念，讓人不確定會發生什麼——「不確定，沒人知道接下來會怎樣」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她飄向窗邊，飄向敞開的天空。接下來呢？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e swallowed the pill to stop the bad student from getting it.
questions.question: Was Chang'e brave?
options: 😅 maybe — she was just lucky it worked out
😴 no — she just did not know what the pill would do
🦁 yes — she gave up everything to protect others
😠 no — she was being selfish and chose herself
optionsZh: 不是——她只是不知道藥丸會怎樣
是的——她放棄一切保護了大家
不是——她自私，只選了自己
questions.explanationZh: 她吞下藥，是為了不讓壞人得到，犧牲了自己的生活——「她放棄一切保護了大家」，這才是真正的勇敢。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥吞下仙藥，阻止壞學生得到它。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She began to float to the window. To the open sky. What now?
questions.explanationZh: 她飄向窗邊，飄向敞開的天空。接下來……奶奶也跟著靜靜望著天。

storyBeat: 飛向月亮 — 后羿會怎麼樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚最後幾個字，記好！
🔑 cloud = 雲
🔑 moon = 月亮
🔑 bright = 亮
🔑 too late = 太晚
特別記住「月亮」——因為嫦娥要去的地方，就在那裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Chang'e went up and up into the sky.
questions.explanationZh: 嫦娥越飛越高，越來越靠近天空。奶奶說，她回頭看了嗎？沒有人知道。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She went past the trees. Past the hills. Past the clouds.
questions.question: How did Chang'e move through the sky?
questions.explanationZh: 她飛過樹梢，飛過山頭，飛過雲層——一路往上，「越升越高」，沒有停下來。
questions.sentenceZh: 她飛過樹，飛過山頭，飛過雲層。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The moon was big and bright that night.
questions.explanationZh: 那晚，月亮特別大、特別亮。奶奶說，好像在等著她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The moon felt closest to her. The stars felt far.
questions.questionEn: Was Chang'e flying toward the moon?
questions.explanationZh: 月亮感覺最近，星星感覺很遠——她是朝著月亮飛去，答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 她覺得月亮離她最近，星星都在很遠的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She landed on the cold grey ground of the moon.
questions.explanationZh: 她降落在月亮上——那裡的地是冰冷的、灰灰的，和家裡完全不一樣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What did the moon's ground feel like?
questions.question: How did the moon feel?
questions.explanationZh: 月亮的地是「冷又灰」的——故事裡說「cold grey ground」，就是這個感覺。
questions.sentenceZh: 月亮的地面摸起來是什麼感覺？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From up there, she could still see her home far below.
questions.explanationZh: 從那麼高的地方，她還能看見遠遠下面的家。奶奶說，那個距離，讓人說不出話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi was running back home. He looked up at the sky.
questions.question: How did Hou Yi feel when he saw her?
questions.explanationZh: 后羿跑著回家，一抬頭，嫦娥已經在月亮上了——他趕不上，只能眼睜睜地，所以是「難過——來不及了」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿往家的方向跑去，抬頭一看，嫦娥已在月亮上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was too late. She was already on the moon.
questions.explanationZh: 他太晚了。她已經在月亮上。奶奶停了很久，沒有說話。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words to their Chinese meanings.
questions.explanationZh:
今天的詞組：
🔑 past the clouds = 飛過雲層
🔑 cold grey ground = 冰冷灰暗的地
🔑 too late = 太晚了
🔑 looked up = 抬頭看

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She went past the trees. Past the hills. Past the clouds.
questions.question: What does the list of things she passed tell us?
options: stopping to look at each place along the way
walking a long way on the ground below
rising very high, very fast through the air
lost and unsure of which way to go
optionsZh: 每到一個地方都停下來看
在地上還有很長的路要走
在空中越飛越高、越飛越快
她迷路了，不知道該往哪走
questions.explanationZh: 樹梢、山頭、雲層——一個比一個高，說明她「越飛越高、越飛越快」。
questions.sentenceZh: 她飛過樹，飛過山頭，飛過雲層。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: She landed on the cold grey ground of the moon.
questions.questionEn: Was the moon a warm and welcoming place?
questions.explanationZh: 月亮的地是「冰冷又灰暗」的——不是溫暖的地方，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 她降落在月亮冰冷灰暗的地面上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: From up there, she could still see her home far below.
questions.question: How might Chang'e feel seeing her home so far below?
options: relieved — glad to finally be far from the danger
proud — happy to be higher than everyone else
curious — wondering who now lived in her house
longing — close enough to see but too far to reach
optionsZh: 如釋重負——終於遠離了危險
驕傲——開心自己比其他人高
好奇——在想誰現在住在她家
questions.explanationZh: 從遠遠的月亮上，還看得見家——看得到，卻永遠回不去。「思念——看得到卻回不去」，這才是最心酸的感覺。
questions.sentenceZh: 從那麼高的地方，她還能看見遠遠下面的家。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi was running back home. He looked up at the sky.
questions.question: How did Hou Yi feel when he saw Chang'e on the moon?
questions.explanationZh: 他跑回來，一抬頭，嫦娥已經在月亮上了，追不回來——這種感覺，只有「心碎又無能為力」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿跑著回家，抬頭望向天空。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was too late. She was already on the moon.
questions.question: What does 'too late' tell us about Hou Yi?
options: arriving home before her and looking for the pill
nothing could be changed now, no matter what
already knowing she would fly away and was ready
feeling angry because she had not waited for him
optionsZh: 他比她先回家，還在找那顆藥
不管怎樣，事情已經無法改變
早就知道她會飛走，心理已有準備
他很生氣，因為她沒有等他回來
questions.explanationZh: 太晚了——她已經在月亮上，再怎麼跑都追不回來，「不管他怎麼做，事情已經無法改變」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他太晚了，她已經在月亮上了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He was too late. She was already on the moon.
questions.questionEn: Could Hou Yi bring Chang'e back to earth?
questions.explanationZh: 已經太晚了——她在月亮上，沒辦法帶她回來，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 他太晚了，她已經在月亮上了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hou Yi was running back home. He looked up at the sky. He was too late.
questions.explanationZh: 后羿跑著回家，抬頭望天——嫦娥已經在月亮上，已經太晚了。

storyBeat: 玉兔陪伴 + 中秋月圓 — 你想念的人是誰?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
今晚最後的故事，再學 4 個字：
🔑 rabbit = 兔子
🔑 friend = 朋友
🔑 autumn = 秋天
🔑 miss = 想念
其中「想念」是今晚最重要的感受——你試試用中文說說看，你想念誰？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the moon, Chang'e was not alone.
questions.explanationZh: 月亮上，嫦娥並不是一個人。奶奶說，故事到這裡，總算透了一口氣。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A small white rabbit lived there. It came to her.
questions.question: Who did Chang'e meet on the moon?
questions.explanationZh: 一隻小白兔走過來靠近她——「small white rabbit」，就是「小巧柔軟的小動物」。
questions.sentenceZh: 嫦娥在月亮上遇見了誰？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The rabbit was soft and warm. It sat next to her.
questions.explanationZh: 那隻白兔毛茸茸的、暖暖的，就這樣坐在她身邊。奶奶說，月亮上有個這樣的朋友，真的很好。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It put its little nose on her hand.
questions.questionEn: Did the rabbit become her friend?
questions.explanationZh: 小兔子把小鼻子輕輕靠在她手上——這個動作，就是在說「我是你的朋友」，所以答案是 Yes。
questions.sentenceZh: 牠把小鼻子輕輕貼在她手上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Down on earth, Hou Yi looked up every night.
questions.explanationZh: 地球上的后羿，每天晚上都抬頭看著月亮。奶奶說，那種思念，一直沒有消失。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He put out her favourite food in the yard each night.
questions.question: Why did Hou Yi put food in the yard?
options: asking the sky to bring rain
sending food up to the moon
questions.explanationZh: 他把她最喜歡的食物擺在院子裡——這是他唯一能做的事，告訴她「我還愛你」。
questions.sentenceZh: 后羿每晚把她最愛吃的食物，擺在院子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Once each year, in autumn, the moon is full and round.
questions.explanationZh: 每年一次，到了秋天，月亮又圓又滿，像一盞大燈掛在天上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: When is the moon full and round each year?
questions.question: When?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說「in autumn」，就是秋天——月亮在秋天最圓最滿。
questions.sentenceZh: 月亮什麼時候最圓最滿？

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People look up. They see the moon. They miss the ones they love.
questions.explanationZh: 大家抬頭看月亮，心裡就會想到遠遠的人——這個感受，叫做「想念」。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words to their Chinese meanings.

pairs.left: put its nose on her hand

questions.explanationZh:
最後幾個詞，記好：
🔑 not alone = 不孤單
🔑 put its nose on her hand = 把鼻子靠在她手上
🔑 miss = 想念
🔑 full and round = 又圓又滿

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: On the moon, Chang'e was not alone. A small white rabbit lived there. It came to her.
questions.question: What does the rabbit coming to her mean?
options: the rabbit was guarding the moon from visitors
she had a gentle companion on the lonely moon
she had to take care of a baby animal all day
the rabbit was sent by the Queen Mother to watch her
optionsZh: 兔子在守護月亮，不讓人靠近
在孤寂的月亮上，她有了溫柔的陪伴
她必須整天照顧一隻小動物
兔子是西王母派來監視她的
questions.explanationZh: 小白兔走向她——那是陪伴。在那麼孤寂的月亮上，有個溫柔的朋友，「她有了溫柔的陪伴」。
questions.sentenceZh: 月亮上，嫦娥並不是一個人。一隻小白兔住在那裡，牠走了過來陪她。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Down on earth, Hou Yi looked up every night.
questions.questionEn: Did Hou Yi forget about Chang'e over time?
questions.explanationZh: 每天晚上都抬頭看月亮——他沒有忘記，他在思念她，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 地球上，后羿每天晚上都抬頭仰望月亮。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He put out her favourite food in the yard each night.
questions.question: What does putting out her food tell us about Hou Yi?
options: frightened — hoping the food would keep him safe
very hungry — cooking too much food every night
still deeply in love — keeping her close in his heart
confused — forgetting she was no longer at home
optionsZh: 很害怕——希望食物能保護他
很肚子餓——每天晚上煮太多
深愛著她——在心裡把她留住
搞不清楚——忘了她已經不在了
questions.explanationZh: 每晚擺她最愛吃的食物——這是對她的思念，告訴她「我沒有忘記你」，「深愛著她，在心裡把她留住」。
questions.sentenceZh: 他每晚把她最愛的食物擺在院子裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People look up. They see the moon. They miss the ones they love.
questions.question: What feeling does looking at the moon bring?
options: 😤 angry at the cold night air
😴 feeling sleepy and ready for bed
😱 scared of the dark night sky
optionsZh: 對冷冷的夜氣感到煩躁
questions.explanationZh: 仰望月亮，心裡想起遠遠的人——那就是「思念」，「思念遠方的人」。
questions.sentenceZh: 大家抬頭看月亮，想念著遠方的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Once each year, in autumn, the moon is full and round. People look up. They miss the ones they love.
questions.question: What is the main feeling of this story's ending?
options: bittersweet — love and loss carried across time
joyful — everyone is happy the story is done
scary — the moon reminds people of the bad student
funny — the whole thing was just a silly mistake
optionsZh: 甜蜜中帶著苦澀——愛與失去跨越時間
快樂——大家都很開心故事結束了
可怕——月亮讓人想起壞學生
好笑——這整件事只是個小誤會
questions.explanationZh: 每年秋天，月亮又圓，人們思念遠方的人——愛還在、但也有失去的遺憾，「甜蜜中帶著苦澀，愛與失去跨越時間」。
questions.sentenceZh: 每年秋天，月亮又圓又滿，人們仰頭，思念自己愛的人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Once each year, in autumn, the moon is full and round.
questions.questionEn: Does the moon look this way every single night?
questions.explanationZh: 「once each year（每年一次）」——不是每天都這樣，只有一年一次，所以答案是 No。
questions.sentenceZh: 每年一次，到了秋天，月亮又圓又滿。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Once each year, the moon is full and round. People look up. They miss the ones they love...
questions.explanationZh: 每年秋天，月亮又圓又滿，人們仰頭看，心裡想起那些遠方的人……奶奶說，這個故事，就是中秋節的由來。
